title: Ducky Hearts
description: the hearts are ducks now! experience a Minecraft experience with 10 duck companions
body:
ducks! this pack includes duck hearts to keep you company instead of boring lifeless red ones. 
this pack has every variant of heart such as: freezing, wither, poison, absorption, and a hardcore variant for each. when you use this, youll be soo astonished you'll almost forget that the heart sprites are 36x36p!
(Now on CurseForge!)

Version 2.0! This adds fish hunger bars for the ducks to be filled up on!

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

it has the vanilla tweaks 'browner leather' vehicle heart texture i just thought it was cooler and the fish in version 2 as well
